intake_questions.text: Does the organisation already hold ISO 27001 certification?
Is the organisation acting as a PII Controller, Processor, or both?
Has a ROPA (Record of Processing Activities) been established?
Does the organisation transfer PII to third parties or international recipients?
Has a Privacy Information Management System (PIMS) been formally documented?

scope_template.prompt: Define the PIMS scope — which functions and PII processing activities are included
List systems and databases processing PII within PIMS scope
Confirm PII processing activities excluded from PIMS scope with justification

requirements.text: PIMS policies and procedures must be established, documented, and aligned with applicable privacy legislation including GDPR and DPDP Act.
requirements.evidence_expectation: PIMS policy document; privacy procedure library; policy review records

requirements.text: The specific purposes for which PII will be processed must be identified, documented in the ROPA, and communicated to PII principals.
requirements.evidence_expectation: ROPA with purpose columns; purpose limitation controls evidence; data minimisation assessment

requirements.text: Mechanisms to obtain, record, and manage PII principal consent must be implemented, enabling granular consent and easy withdrawal.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Consent UI evidence; consent database; withdrawal mechanism; consent audit log sample

requirements.text: PII principals must be provided with sufficient information about PII processing to exercise their privacy rights, through an accessible privacy notice.
requirements.evidence_expectation: External privacy notice; data subject rights FAQ; rights exercise process documentation

requirements.text: Legal basis for all PII transfers to third parties or across borders must be identified, documented, and backed by appropriate transfer mechanisms.
requirements.evidence_expectation: Transfer mechanism register; SCCs or BCRs; processor DPAs; transfer impact assessments

evidence_requests.title: PIMS Policy Documentation
evidence_requests.description: PIMS policy and supporting privacy procedure documents with management approval and review records

evidence_requests.title: ROPA with Purpose Documentation
evidence_requests.description: Complete ROPA with processing purpose, legal basis, data categories, retention, and recipients per processing activity

evidence_requests.title: Consent Mechanism Evidence
evidence_requests.description: Screenshots/recordings of consent UI, consent database schema, withdrawal process, and sample consent audit log

evidence_requests.title: Privacy Notice and Rights Process
evidence_requests.description: Current privacy notice with version history; data subject rights response SOP and sample fulfilled requests

evidence_requests.title: PII Transfer Mechanisms Register
evidence_requests.description: Register of all third-party and international transfers with transfer mechanism (SCC/BCR/adequacy); sample DPAs

task_templates.title: Review PIMS policy alignment with ISO 27701 and applicable law
Assess ROPA completeness and purpose documentation
Evaluate consent mechanism for granularity and withdrawal capability
Assess privacy notice against ISO 27701 transparency requirements
Review PII transfer register and transfer mechanism adequacy
Interview DPO on PIMS scope, governance, and continual improvement
Gap analysis between current PIMS and ISO 27701 Annex requirements

finding_templates.title_pattern: Processing purpose not documented in ROPA: {processing_activity}

severity_model.critical: PII processed without any lawful basis or consent; fundamental rights breach; regulatory action expected
severity_model.high: Significant PIMS gap; supervisory authority investigation or PII principal complaint likely
severity_model.medium: Partial compliance gap requiring remediation within 90 days
severity_model.low: Best-practice gap; no immediate privacy harm; 6-month remediation window
severity_model.informational: Enhancement recommendation for PIMS maturity improvement

advisory_clinic_templates.title: Consent Architecture Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Review consent granularity, layering, and withdrawal flows; recommend consent management platform if needed

advisory_clinic_templates.title: International Transfer Compliance Advisory
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Map all cross-border transfers; advise on appropriate transfer mechanisms (SCCs, BCRs, adequacy decisions)

advisory_clinic_templates.title: PIMS Implementation Roadmap
advisory_clinic_templates.guidance: Prioritise remediation actions; produce phased implementation plan with effort estimates
